sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good, so the right panel is all gray now (all cells are 'g'). The top bar shows blue (b) at the right end on rows 19-22.
Now I need to figure out what to do next. The diamond pattern completed and reset. Maybe I need to:
1. Move the blue box on the left using arrow keys
2. Click the blue area on the right end of the top bar
3. Or maybe the pattern completion triggers something else
Let me try moving the blue box with arrow keys first. If it moves, then that's the player avatar. Let me try RIGHT to see if it moves along the top bar.
